violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by bread racks. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room used by kitchen staff was lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025

The dishwasher was nonfunctional at time of inspection with chemicals not hooked up. Establishment will use proper procedures in 2 bay sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize any equipment or utensils not returned to the high school. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025
Establishment is lacking a 3 bay sink, with a 2 bay sink in place. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment (stove) or items were observed in the hallway. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
The table legs of the dishwasher table is in poor repair, with peeling paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/01/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2024

Corn alote received at 57 degrees F. Receiving temperature for cold food is 41 degrees F or colder. Corn alote was placed in freezer to rapidly chill. Discussed NOT placing cold food into the same Cambro delivery box as hot foods with employee. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
Pipes near the kitchen hand sink area are in poor repair, rusted with chipping paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The wall by the kitchen hand sink area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024
The hand-washing sink in the toilet room used by employees was lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2024

Hummus was observed thawing in stagnant 106 degree water. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean on the table near hand sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024
The facility is lacking a 3 bay sink, noted in prior inspection in 2019. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the can opener base, and drawer handles have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The establishment does not employ a Rhode Island Certified Food Protection Manager. Establishment to register with state. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2024

Cheese was observed held at 56 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was placed into refrigeration to chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Roasted greenbeans were observed held at (48) degrees Fahrenheit at cold hold unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per staff, green beans were cooked the day before, establishment is not permitted to cook and cool due to inadequate refrigeration. Food that was out of temperature for an unknown amount of time was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
